title: Method of electroforming a hollow needle with a side-hole
abstract: A method of electroforming a hollow needle with a side-hole, the method comprises providing a radially extendable needle mould (100) with a protruding side-hole forming structure (108) and a metal seed layer (150), wherein the metal seed layer is deposited on a needle forming surface (106) with the exception of a side-hole forming surface (110) at the side-hole forming position. The method further comprises electroforming a metal and providing an electroformed metal needle layer (160) on the deposited metal seed layer (150), whereby the electroformed metal needle layer (160) provides a needle layer wall structure (162) surrounding an inner lumen (164), and whereby a side-hole (166) is formed in the wall structure (162) at a side-hole forming position. The method further comprises extending the radially extendable needle mould (100) and thereby releasing the electroformed metal needle layer (160) from the needle mould (100), wherein the electroformed metal needle-layer (160) comprises a body portion (176), wherein the body portion (176) is a body portion of the hollow needle (170) with the side-hole (172).
claims:
Claims 1. A method of manufacturing a needle mould (100) with a metal seed layer (150), wherin the needle mould is adapted for electroforming a hollow needle (170) with a side- hole (172), wherein the method comprises: providing a needle mould (100), wherein the needle mould comprises a plain up per surface (101) with a recess (104), wherein the recess (104) defines an opening (102), a bottom (103), the recess further defines a central axial axis (x) being parallel to a normal vector of the upper surface (101), wherein the central axial axis (x) defines a positive axial direction from the bottom (103) towards the opening (102) and a radial ax is (r) normal to the axial axis (x), and wherein the recess (104) is adapted to be radially extendable, and wherein the recess (104) comprises: side surfaces (105) extending from the opening and to the bottom (103) and providing a needle forming surface (106) for forming the outer surface (174) of the hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172), wherein the needle forming surface (106) comprises a side-hole forming structure (108) comprising a protrusion (114) protruding towards the central axis, wherein the protrusion is adapted to shield a side-hole forming surface (110) against deposition of the metal seed layer (150), wherein the protrusion (114) forms a radially extending undercut (116), wherein the undercut forms a surface providing at least a por tion of the side-hole forming surface (110), wherein the side-hole forming surface (110) defines a side-hole forming position (112) of the needle forming surface (106); and depositing a metal and thereby providing the metal seed layer (150) on the nee dle forming surface (106), wherein the side-hole forming structure (108) shields the side-hole forming surface (110), whereby no metal is deposited on the side-hole forming surface (110) . 2. The method according to claim 1, wherein a radial extension of the radially extendable recess at the side-hole forming position defines a first radial length (126), wherein the undercut defines a second radial length (128) being smaller than the first length, where by the needle mould is adapted to release the formed hollow needle. 3. The method according to any of claims 1 or 2, wherein the undercut (116) forms a portion of the needle forming surface (106) defining an undercut surface area (120), wherein the undercut surface area (120) defines a normal vector (122) with a negative axial component. 4. A needle mould (100) with a metal seed layer (160), wherein the needle mould is adapted for electroforming a hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172), wherein the needle mould (100) comprises a plain upper surface (101) with a recess (104), wherein the recess (104) defines an opening (102), a bottom (103), and wherein the recess fur ther defines a central axial axis (x) being parallel to a normal vector of the upper surface (101), wherein the central axial axis (x) defines a positive axial direction from the bottom (103) towards the opening (102) and a radial axis (r) normal to the axial axis (x), and wherein the recess (104) is adapted to be radially extendable, and wherein the recess (104) comprises: side surfaces (105) extending from the opening and to the bottom (103) and providing a needle forming surface (106) for forming the outer surface (174) of the hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172), wherein the needle forming surface (106) comprises a side-hole forming structure (108) comprising a protrusion (114) protruding towards the central axis, wherein the protrusion is adapted to shield a side-hole forming surface (110) against deposition of the metal seed layer (150), wherein the protrusion (114) forms a radially extending undercut (116), wherein the undercut forms a surface providing at least a por tion of the side-hole forming surface (110), wherein the side-hole forming surface (110) defines a side-hole forming position (112) of the needle forming surface (106); and depositing a metal and thereby providing the metal seed layer (150) on the nee dle forming surface (106), wherein the side-hole forming structure (108) shields the side-hole forming surface (110), whereby no metal is deposited on the side-hole forming surface (110), a metal seed layer (150) deposited on the needle forming surface (106) with the exception of the side-hole forming surface (110) . 5. The needle mould according to claim 4, wherein a radial extension of the radially ex tendable recess at the side-hole forming position defines a first radial length (126), wherein the undercut defines a second radial length (128) being smaller than the first length, whereby the needle mould is adapted to release the formed hollow needle. 6. The needle mould according to any of claims 4 or 5, wherein the undercut (116) forms a portion of the needle forming surface (106) defining an undercut surface area (120), 

 wherein the undercut surface area (120) defines a normal vector (122) with a negative axial component. 7. The needle mould according to any of claims 4-6, wherein the radially extendable re cess (104) is adapted to enable the release of the formed hollow needle (172) by extend ing in a radial direction and thereby alleviating the hindrance created between the under cut (116) and the hollow needle (172) formed on the needle forming surface (106) below the undercut (116), wherein below is defined as a position in the negative axial direction of the undercut, wherein the hindrance is against movement of the electroformed metal needle layer (160) in the axial direction relative to the mould (100). 8. A method of electroforming a hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172), the method comprising : providing a radially extendable needle mould (100) with a protruding side-hole forming structure (108) and a metal seed layer (150) according to any of claims 4-7, wherein the metal seed layer (150) is deposited on the needle forming surface (106) with the exception of the side-hole forming surface (110) at the side-hole forming position (112), electroforming a metal and providing an electroformed metal needle layer (160) on the deposited metal seed layer (150), whereby the electroformed metal needle layer (160) provides a needle layer wall structure (162) surrounding an inner lumen (164), and whereby a side-hole (166) is formed in the wall structure (162) at the side-hole forming position (112), extending the radially extendable needle mould (100) and thereby releasing the electroformed metal needle layer (160) from the needle mould (100), wherein the elec troformed metal needle-layer (160) comprises a body portion (176), wherein the body portion (176) is a body portion of the hollow needle (170) with the side-hole (172) . 9. A method according to claim 8, wherein the radially extendable mould is extended with a radial length exceeding the second radial length (128), and thereby alleviating any hindrance created between the undercut (116) and the needle formed on the needle forming surface (106) below the undercut (116), wherein below is defined as a position in the negative axial direction of the undercut (116) . 10. A method according to any of the claims 8-9, wherein the extending the radially ex tendable mould comprises separating a first mould portion (142) from a second mould 

 portion (144) along a separation line (140) and moving the two mould portions away from each other and in the radial direction. 11. A method according to any of the claims 8-10, wherein the extending the radially ex tendable mould comprises stretching and radially extending the mould . 12. A method according to any of the claims 8-11, wherein the method further comprises lubricating the deposited metal seed layer (150), and thereby providing a lubrication lay er. 13. A method according to claim 12, wherein the method further comprises separating the electroformed metal needle layer (160) from the deposited metal seed layer (150), wherein the separation is enabled by the lubrication layer. 14. An electroformed hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172) obtainable by the meth od according to any of claims 8-13, wherein the electroformed needle cannula comprises a needle wall structure (178) corresponding to the needle layer wall structure (164) of the electroformed metal needle layer (160), wherein a portion of the needle wall struc ture (178) is a radial wall portion (177), wherein the radial wall portion (177) is formed by the side-hole forming structure (108), and wherein the radial wall portion (177) ex tends radially into a hollow lumen of the hollow needle (178) . 15. An electroformed hollow needle (170) with a side-hole (172) comprising a distal end (173) for piercing the skin and a proximal end (175) for communicating with an injection device, wherein the hollow needle (170) comprises: a needle wall structure (178) comprising : a longitudinal wall portion (179) comprising the side hole (172), wherein the longitudinal wall portion (179) surrounds an inner lumen (171), and wherein the side-hole (172) is adapted to provide fluid communication with the inner lumen (171), and a radial wall portion extending radially into the inner lumen (171) from the longi tudinal wall portion, and arranged at the circumference of the side-hole (172), wherein the side-hole is arranged at a position distal to the radial wall portion (177) .
